_comment: Release history. Each entry becomes a section on /changelog/ with SoftwareApplication JSON-LD.

releases.title: Apps + Agentic Services + grouped commands
items: New: 7 apps (Revit Copilot, Adelphos Chat, Specbuilder, Report Builder, Document Controller, QA Manager, Schedule Builder) with crown-jewel page layouts.
New: 3 agentic services (Finances, Project Management, managed Document Controller) with maturity ladder + outcomes.
New: Apps + Agentic Services dropdowns in the menubar; Demos / Workflows / Resources / Downloads nested under Docs.
New: Per-page detail paragraphs (3-paragraph readable) + per-app pull-quotes.
New: Features section per page (flat or grouped — QA Manager has 6 grouped categories with 33 checks).
New: Commands index grouped by mini-project (pillar) with filter dropdown.
New: SEO/AEO suite — meta + OG + Twitter + JSON-LD + sitemap + robots + llms.txt + auto-FAQ + related blocks.

releases.title: Workflows + Schedules pipeline
items: New: Workflow page type with hero video + 'How it flows' narrative + settings table.
New: First end-to-end workflow page generated from skill markdown (Schedules).

releases.title: Tools + Commands inventories at scale
items: Auto-generated inventory pages for 191 MCP tools and 163 Revit commands.
Demo gallery with 14 categories and 60 demos.

releases.title: Site shell + sandbox infrastructure
items: Three-column docs layout (left rail nav, content, right rail anchors).
adelphos_CLI introduced with extract → draft → promote → build pipeline.
Local Node-based dev server on port 8765.
